notableEvents.label: William Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Jackson Chourio to 3rd. Brice Turang out at 2nd. William Contreras out at 1st.
